title: Tetrion The Original All Purpose Ready Mixed Filler Tube, 330 ml
features: Tetrion All Purpose Filler is the same tried and trusted formulation which has been the "go to" for trade decorators and DIY enthusiasts for years
Strong reliable formulation which is drillable, spreadable, paintable, pluggable, and grindable
Long lasting repairs, resistant to vibration, shrinking, sagging and cracking
Ready to use formula offers convenience for quick repair jobs
Versatile filler for use inside and out on multiple surfaces
description: From the manufacturer Tetrion has become one of the most recognisable names with the professional trade market over the last 40 years. With Fillers, Adhesives, Decorating Sundries and much more, Tetrion covers every aspect of modern household decorating. From its humble beginnings Tetrion is still winning praise from loyal customers; as well as attracting new trades people and DIY enthusiasts with its reputation as one of, if not the best homecare range on the market. Tetrion All Purpose Filler 330g Tetrion All Purpose Filler is available in a Ready Mixed format, offering all the same benefits as the powder formulation but with the added advantage of easier preparation. It seals and fills most household materials including plaster, wood, stone, concrete and brickwork. Available in various sizes of pots as well as a convenient ready mixed tube. Suitable for interior and exterior use Resistant to vibration, shrinking and cracking Resilient to expansion and contraction Drillable and tappable Water and weather resistant Highly versatile - suitable for multiple surface applications Ready mixed for convenience for quick repair jobs - no dosing or mixing required High strength polymer re-enforced APPLICATION Ensure surfaces to be filled are dry and free from any loose materials. Remove any decayed wood down to dry sound material. Stir filler thoroughly before use; if required add a few drops of water to improve workability. Apply with a filling knife and smooth off immediately with a wet blade. Tetrion All Purpose Filler must be applied in layers of no less than 3mm and no greater than 10mm to ensure adhesion and can be drilled or tapped provided the depth of set filler is at least equal to that of the screw or plug. Setting occurs in approximately 4-6 hours depending on depth of fill and atmospheric conditions. After 24 hours filler can be sanded and then over-painted with most household paints. Over-paint with an oil-based paint when using externally. NOTE: Do not use Tetrion All-Purpose Filler in wet or damp conditions, or on surfaces regularly under water. Do not sandwich between layers of paint and/or sealant. Store away from frost.
